added.summary: Changed getSubset() return type from SkIRect to SkRect, updated implementation to use SkRect::MakeXYWH instead of SkIRect::MakeXYWH for bitmap subset bounds.
Added conditional compilation with SKOTTIE_TRIVIAL_FONTRUN_ITER flag to use TrivialFontRunIterator on Chrome Linux/CrOS to avoid crashes from font fallback issues.
added.diff:

--- a/modules/skottie/src/text/TextShaper.cpp

@@ -318,12 +318,19 @@ public:
         const auto lang_iter = fDesc.fLocale
                 ? std::make_unique<SkShaper::TrivialLanguageRunIterator>(fDesc.fLocale, utf8_bytes)
                 : SkShaper::MakeStdLanguageRunIterator(start, utf8_bytes);
+#if defined(SKOTTIE_TRIVIAL_FONTRUN_ITER)
+        // Chrome Linux/CrOS does not have a fallback-capable fontmgr, and crashes if fallback is
+        // triggered.  Using a TrivialFontRunIterator avoids the issue (https://crbug.com/1520148).
+        const auto font_iter = std::make_unique<SkShaper::TrivialFontRunIterator>(fFont,
+                                                                                  utf8_bytes);
+#else
         const auto font_iter = SkShaper::MakeFontMgrRunIterator(

                                     fDesc.fFontFamily,

                                     lang_iter.get());
+#endif
         const auto bidi_iter = SkShaper::MakeBiDiRunIterator(start, utf8_bytes,
                                     shape_ltr ? kBidiLevelLTR : kBidiLevelRTL);
         const auto scpt_iter = SkShaper::MakeScriptRunIterator(start, utf8_bytes,

added.summary: Added SkSafeMath for overflow checking, replaced direct integer additions of totalRectCount with safe addition calls, plus added safeMath validity check before rectangle drawing.
Introduced SkSafeMath to safely add quad counts when combining drawing operations, returning CombineResult::kCannotCombine if integer overflow occurs.
Added overflow validation to check if repeatCount is negative or exceeds SK_MaxS32 divided by verticesPerRepetition before calculating vertex count.
Replaced direct integer addition of numRects with SkSafeMath safe addition, added validity check to ensure no overflow before rectangle drawing.
Replaced direct accumulation of numRects with SkSafeMath safe addition and added overflow validity check before processing regions.
Changed allocateSlotData() to return std::optional<SlotData>, adding SkSafeMath for overflow protection and SkTFitsIn to verify size fits in int before allocation.
Updated allocateSlotData() declaration to return std::optional<SlotData> and added #include <optional> header.
Added SkSerialProcs include and modified drawable deserialization to pass SkDeserialProcs with fAllowSkSL=false for security.

removed.summary: Removed build config patches for Apple platforms (macOS Catalyst, watchOS), Windows Runtime (WinRT), and visibility/PIC control flags.
Removed Tizen-specific toolchain configuration and simplified MSVC environment setup logic.
Removed conditional compilation logic that excluded SkWGL files for WinRT builds.

removed.summary: Removed MakeDefault() factory method wrapper for creating SkFontMgr instances.
Removed RefDefault() method declaration for obtaining the default typeface.
Removed RefDefault() implementation that cached default typeface singleton using thread-safe initialization.
Removed custom GLX loader and proc getter classes for dynamic loading of GLX functions via dlsym.
Removed Metal backend code that used .reset() method calls replaced with .retain() calls in the fork.
Removed Tizen-specific font configuration that increased max pattern ID limit from 16 to 256.
Removed modification to ARM64 exclude condition in WGL compilation guard.

@@ -0,0 +1,1159 @@
+/*

+
+#ifndef sk_types_DEFINED
+#define sk_types_DEFINED
+
+#include <stdint.h>
+#include <stddef.h>
+
+#ifdef __cplusplus
+    #define SK_C_PLUS_PLUS_BEGIN_GUARD    extern "C" {
+    #define SK_C_PLUS_PLUS_END_GUARD      }
+#else
+    #include <stdbool.h>
+    #define SK_C_PLUS_PLUS_BEGIN_GUARD
+    #define SK_C_PLUS_PLUS_END_GUARD
+#endif
+
+#if !defined(SK_C_API)
+    #if defined(SKIA_C_DLL)
+        #if defined(_MSC_VER)
+            #if SKIA_IMPLEMENTATION
+                #define SK_C_API __declspec(dllexport)
+            #else
+                #define SK_C_API __declspec(dllimport)
+            #endif
+        #else
+            #define SK_C_API __attribute__((visibility("default")))
+        #endif
+    #else
+        #define SK_C_API
+    #endif
+#endif
+
+#if defined(_WIN32)
+    // On Windows, Vulkan commands use the stdcall convention
+    #define VKAPI_ATTR
+    #define VKAPI_CALL __stdcall
+    #define VKAPI_PTR  VKAPI_CALL
+#elif defined(__ANDROID__) && defined(__ARM_ARCH) && __ARM_ARCH < 7
+    #error "Vulkan isn't supported for the 'armeabi' NDK ABI"
+#elif defined(__ANDROID__) && defined(__ARM_ARCH) && __ARM_ARCH >= 7 && defined(__ARM_32BIT_STATE)
+    // On Android 32-bit ARM targets, Vulkan functions use the "hardfloat"
+    // calling convention, i.e. float parameters are passed in registers. This
+    // is true even if the rest of the application passes floats on the stack,
+    // as it does by default when compiling for the armeabi-v7a NDK ABI.
+    #define VKAPI_ATTR __attribute__((pcs("aapcs-vfp")))
+    #define VKAPI_CALL
+    #define VKAPI_PTR  VKAPI_ATTR
+#else
+    // On other platforms, use the default calling convention
+    #define VKAPI_ATTR
+    #define VKAPI_CALL
+    #define VKAPI_PTR
+#endif
+
+#if !defined(SK_TO_STRING)
+    #define SK_TO_STRING(X) SK_TO_STRING_IMPL(X)
+    #define SK_TO_STRING_IMPL(X) #X
+#endif
+
+#ifndef SK_C_INCREMENT
+#define SK_C_INCREMENT 0
+#endif
+
+///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
+
+SK_C_PLUS_PLUS_BEGIN_GUARD
+

changed.summary: Adds includes for GpuTypes.h, GrGLDirectContext.h, GrVkDirectContext.h; changes GrDirectContext:: to GrDirectContexts:: for GL and Vulkan context creation.
Adds SkFontMgr.h include and introduces skiasharp_ref_default_fontmgr() and get_default_typeface() functions to preserve legacy null-means-platform-default behavior.
Adds include for GpuTypes.h header needed for GPU support.
Adds platform-specific font manager includes (Mac/iOS/Windows/Android/Fontconfig/FreeType), removes direct sk_typeface_create_* implementations, delegates to platform font managers.
Minor structural changes to type mapping declarations (443 to 445 lines).
